## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between JioHotstar and GrowthX for improving AI visibility and brand presence.](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [JioHotstar seeks to boost AI visibility, particularly in ChatGPT and other AI services for generic entertainment queries](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [GrowthX offers content creation services at $15k/month for 5 articles/week, focusing on AI-optimized editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [JioHotstar currently lacks a blog section, limiting immediate content publishing options](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [GrowthX uses proprietary tools and Scrunch for AI visibility tracking and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

## Topics

### JioHotstar Background and Objectives

  - Merger of Jio Cinema and Hotstar, now \#1 streaming partner in India
  - [Presence in India, Europe, and other regions](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Seeking to improve AI visibility and brand mentions, especially for generic entertainment queries](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Current low visibility in AI sources like ChatGPT, despite being a major player](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Services

  - [Create editorial content at scale, optimized for AI search](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Conduct deep research on client, competition, and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Develop custom artifacts (audience profiles, brand voice, etc.) to inform content creation](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Use proprietary platform with AI workflows for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Offer technical audits, content roadmaps, and personalized strategies](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $15,000/month for 5 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

### Content Creation and AI Visibility Strategies

  - [Focus on creating best answers to audience questions](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Publish content daily to increase AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Use robust workflows considering key AI ranking factors](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Create various content types: movie reviews, comparisons, "best of" lists](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Emphasize technical SEO, PR, and backlinking alongside content creation](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### Tools and Analytics

  - [GrowthX uses internal platform for content creation and workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Scrunch used for AEO and GEO analytics, tracking prompts and competitor presence](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [SEMrush utilized for keyword analysis](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Airtable for roadmap collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [Slack for async communication](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)

### Challenges and Considerations

  - [JioHotstar lacks a dedicated blog section (in pipeline)](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - Initial budget expectation (\<$9,000/month) vs. GrowthX's minimum ($15,000/month)
  - [Uncertainty about ROI in the "black box" of AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Need for India-specific strategy and potentially native language speakers](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide observations on JioHotstar's current AI visibility in India](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Share detailed proposal for the $15k/month package](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Explore non-blog options for improving AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [JioHotstar to consider budget flexibility and relevance of editorial content approach](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Potential deep research on competitive landscape if engagement seems viable](https://fathom.video/share/2q6GpgY3Mk1o7JxTk2Wuc7Rp__eKeKQH?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
